backend/main.mo: Motoko actor for a salon app that handles booking submissions (open to all) and retrieval (admin-only), includes blob storage and authorization mixins, and exposes static salon info via a public query.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting the phone number update task (old +919690417361 → new +919917417861) across six frontend components, with associated test ID REQ-32 and high confidence.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON map of short descriptions for each frontend source file, serving as a reference summary of component responsibilities and recent changes (e.g., phone number updates).
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base CSS file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes, covering background, foreground, chart, and sidebar color tokens.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point for the React app, mounting the app into a root div and loading the TypeScript module entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that composes all page sections in a single-page layout and conditionally renders the AdminDashboard overlay based on a URL param or state toggle.
frontend/src/components/AdminDashboard.t: Full-screen admin overlay with PIN authentication (default 1234) that fetches and displays all bookings in a styled table/card layout using gold and charcoal theming.
Reusable scroll-triggered animation wrapper using IntersectionObserver to apply directional entrance animations (up, left, right, zoom) with configurable delay and element type.
frontend/src/components/BookingContact.t: Two-column booking section with a 6-field form that submits to the backend, shows a post-submission WhatsApp CTA with pre-filled booking details, and displays contact info using the new phone number +91 9917417861.
frontend/src/components/FloatingActionBu: Fixed floating buttons for Instagram, WhatsApp (wa.me/919917417861), and Call (tel:+919917417861), all updated to the new phone number.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Renders the site footer with brand info, social media links (Instagram, WhatsApp, Facebook), a services list, quick navigation links, and contact details (phone, address, hours) for Imagine Unisex Salon.
frontend/src/components/Gallery.tsx: Displays a responsive image grid of 21 salon photos with animated entrance effects, and opens a Lightbox component for full-screen viewing with prev/next navigation.
frontend/src/components/Hero.tsx: Full-screen hero section with an auto-advancing image slideshow, animated headline and tagline, and CTA buttons to scroll to the booking or services section.
frontend/src/components/InstagramGallery: Displays a 12-image Instagram-style grid where each image links to the salon's Instagram profile, with hover overlays showing Instagram and heart icons.
frontend/src/components/Lightbox.tsx: Full-screen image lightbox modal supporting keyboard navigation (arrow keys, Escape), prev/next buttons, an image counter, and dot indicators for the current position.
frontend/src/components/LoadingScreen.ts: Animated loading screen displayed on initial page load, featuring a spinning ring, salon branding, and a progress bar that completes over ~3.2 seconds before fading out and calling onComplete.
frontend/src/components/MapSection.tsx: Displays the salon's location section with an embedded Google Map, address, phone number, business hours, and a 'Get Directions' button.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Fixed top navigation bar with scroll-aware styling, smooth-scroll nav links, Instagram and phone links, and a mobile hamburger menu.
frontend/src/components/Pricing.tsx: Renders a service menu grid organized by category (haircuts, color, nails, etc.) without prices, prompting users to contact the salon for pricing.
frontend/src/components/Services.tsx: Displays a grid of salon service cards (haircut, beard, coloring, etc.) each with an image, icon, name, and short description.
frontend/src/components/Testimonials.tsx: Auto-advancing carousel of client testimonials with manual prev/next controls, star ratings, and animated transitions.
frontend/src/components/ThemeToggle.tsx: A button component that toggles between light and dark themes using the useTheme hook, displaying a Sun or Moon icon accordingly.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an Internet Computer actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication on the ICP platform, managing login state, identity persistence, and AuthClient creation with configurable options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching salon info, retrieving all bookings, and submitting new bookings via the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useScrollAnimation.ts: Custom hook that uses IntersectionObserver to track when an element enters the viewport, returning a ref and visibility state for scroll-triggered animations.
frontend/src/hooks/useTheme.ts: Custom hook that manages light/dark theme state, persisting the preference to localStorage and toggling the 'dark' class on the document root.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Google Fonts, configures Tailwind CSS layers, and defines CSS custom properties for the light/dark color system including gold, charcoal, and cream design tokens.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider into the DOM root.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence helpers and a function to clean sensitive params from the URL hash.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the theme with custom fonts, oklch-based color tokens (gold, charcoal, cream, sidebar), box shadows, border radii, and keyframe animations for the salon UI.
project_state.json: Project state manifest describing the luxury salon website's features, architectural decisions, known issues, and metadata including contact info and design constraints.
